forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+color: 0e8a16
+description: 'Tier 1 foundational data layer. The `entity` MCP server exposing the GENERIC, type-agnostic entity capability over `EntityContext`/`EntityCache`/`EntityTypeStore`: get/list/add/update/delete + archive/unarchive for ANY entity type, clipboard cut/copy/paste (wraps PasteMatrix), and entity SEARCH (wraps EntitySearchIndex — search is an entity capability, not a separate server). Writes are undoable via the shared StoreContext, and feed the entity event bus. This is what the cross-cutting `entity.*` commands, the frontend''s generic `get_entity` reads, and the search UI all call. Distinct from `kanban`, which keeps kanban-DOMAIN ops (board lifecycle, task positioning/move, next/complete, assign, tag/untag). Depends on store-service.'
+name: Entity Service (generic data layer)
reverse_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,3 +0,0 @@
